_meta.note: Deterministic, offline compaction profiles for noisy TOOL output only. Never applied to model claims or provenance. Distilled from AgentArk's ArkDistill idea, rebuilt to the Sophia discipline (deterministic, offline, fail-open-to-original).

generic.summary: Conservative default: strip ANSI/control noise, collapse blank-line and duplicate-line runs, keep head+tail.

browser_html.summary: Browser/HTML dumps: drop scripts, styles, tags, and SVG/base64 blobs; keep visible text head+tail.

log_dump.summary: Build/CI/server logs: strip ANSI + leading ISO timestamps, collapse repeated lines, keep head+tail (tail holds the error).

tool_trace.summary: Tool/exec traces: strip ANSI, collapse blank+duplicate lines, keep head+tail.

json_response.summary: Structured JSON: keep only high-signal top-level fields when present, else fall through to head+tail. Compacts pretty-printing.
